name: I-81 Widening - Shenandoah Valley Corridor
description: Widening of I-81 from 4 to 6 lanes between MM 264 and MM 298 (34 miles). Includes earthwork grading base course asphalt paving drainage structures guardrail bridge approach work and MOT. VDOT Project UPC 118842.

name: US-11 Overlay & Drainage Improvement
description: Mill and overlay 16.2 miles of US-11 in Shenandoah County. 2-inch mill full-depth reclamation at 4 locations drainage pipe replacement and ADA curb ramp upgrades at 18 intersections.

name: VA-259 Bridge Approach Reconstruction
address: VA Route 259 at Shenandoah River Crossing
description: Reconstruction of bridge approach roadway both ends. Full depth reclamation approach slabs micro-piling for soft subgrade guardrail and drainage. Coordination with bridge contractor required.
